name: ASUS TUF GAMING B760M-PLUS II Intel B760 (LGA 1700) mATX motherboard,three M.2 slots,12+1 DrMOS,Realtek 2.5Gb Ethernet,HDMI,DisplayPort,Rear USB 20Gbps Type-C,Thunderbolt (USB4) support, Aura Sync
